evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: implement security measures, and support user acceptance testing and production releases
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals (UAT, reporting governance, security, performance monitoring) dominate with no velocity/shipping-speed language present anywhere in the JD.
evidence.domain_risk: Experience with Microsoft Fabric, financial services environments, cloud analytics platforms... are advantageous.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Financial services exposure is only listed as a desirable/advantageous skill rather than the core sector or explicit compliance responsibility, keeping this at moderate rather than high.
evidence.data_team_maturity: manage assets in Microsoft Fabric and Power BI Service, implement security measures, and support user acceptance testing and production releases
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools and governance practices (Microsoft Fabric, Power BI Service, security, reporting governance, UAT/production releases) appear directly in responsibilities, indicating an established, growing BI practice.
evidence.jd_authorship: create DAX calculations, monitor report performance, manage assets in Microsoft Fabric and Power BI Service, implement security measures
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities name precise tools and technical actions (DAX, Power Query, Microsoft Fabric, Power BI Service security), letting the reader understand the actual day-to-day work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: converting business requirements into effective visualizations, and developing semantic data models
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves general internal business reporting needs and the BI/semantic layer itself rather than a single named commercial, product, or finance function.
evidence.autonomy_level: converting business requirements into effective visualizations... Experience translating business requirements and managing multiple priorities is required.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role receives and translates business requirements into deliverables (dashboards, models) rather than setting direction or strategy, matching execution.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate's own work or AI systems consuming the candidate's data output.
evidence.testing_framing: support user acceptance testing and production releases
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: UAT and production release support appear as a listed responsibility without explicit ownership/definition framing of a testing standard, matching tool_listed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Security and governance concerns are present but secondary to the core dashboard-delivery framing, and there is no explicit compliance/regulatory register, keeping this moderate.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: designing and maintaining Power BI dashboards... manage assets in Microsoft Fabric and Power BI Service
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role maintains and manages existing BI assets and governance practices rather than building new infrastructure from scratch, indicating fix/scale work.
evidence.work_arrangement: "office attendance required 4 days per week" (Employment Type: Permanent (Hybrid))
evidence.loss_aversion: "implement security measures" and "reporting governance" are named responsibilities, but they are secondary to core dashboard delivery with no explicit compliance/regulatory framing.
